'''鈭歬-s-dh-p''' ('''kakasdhepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:annuitize|annuitize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-s-dh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:annuitize|annuitize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-s-dh-p
|-
! Lemma
| kakasdhepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikasdhepoko|thikasdhepoko]] || [[word:jikasdhepoko|jikasdhepoko]] || [[word:shikasdhepoko|shikasdhepoko]] || [[word:kikasdhepoko|kikasdhepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukasdhepoko|thuthukasdhepoko]] || [[word:jujukasdhepoko|jujukasdhepoko]] || [[word:shushukasdhepoko|shushukasdhepoko]] || [[word:kukukasdhepoko|kukukasdhepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokasdhepoko|thokasdhepoko]] || [[word:jokasdhepoko|jokasdhepoko]] || [[word:shokasdhepoko|shokasdhepoko]] || [[word:kokasdhepoko|kokasdhepoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakasdhepoko|thakasdhepoko]] || [[word:jakasdhepoko|jakasdhepoko]] || [[word:shakasdhepoko|shakasdhepoko]] || [[word:kakasdhepoko|kakasdhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakasdhepoko|thakasdhepoko]] || [[word:jakasdhepoko|jakasdhepoko]] || [[word:shakasdhepoko|shakasdhepoko]] || [[word:kakasdhepoko|kakasdhepoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
